description.value:
Trigger Your last action was to deal piercing damage to an enemy within your reach

Effect Attempt an Athletics check to [[/act grapple]] the same enemy. The weapon that dealt the triggering damage gains the grapple trait for this check. On a success, the target also takes @Damage[1d8[persistent,piercing]] damage (or @Damage[2d8[persistent,piercing]] damage on a critical success). When the target is no longer @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Grabbed] or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Restrained] by you, the persistent damage ends.
